verses.text: The law of the trespass offering, most holy; its blood and fat are offered. Trespass. The offering is wholly given to God.
The law of the trespass offering, most holy; its blood and fat are offered. Trespass. The offering is wholly given to God.
The law of the trespass offering, most holy; its blood and fat are offered. Trespass. The offering is wholly given to God.
The law of the trespass offering, most holy; its blood and fat are offered. Trespass. The offering is wholly given to God.
The priest who atones has the offering for his portion. The priest's portion. He is fed from the altar.
The priest who atones has the offering for his portion. The priest's portion. He is fed from the altar.
The priest who atones has the offering for his portion. The priest's portion. He is fed from the altar.
The priest keeps the skin and the meat offerings. The priest's due. Those who minister share the gifts.
The priest keeps the skin and the meat offerings. The priest's due. Those who minister share the gifts.
The priest keeps the skin and the meat offerings. The priest's due. Those who minister share the gifts.
The law of the peace offering, eaten the same day if for thanksgiving. Thanksgiving. Gratitude is offered and shared.
The law of the peace offering, eaten the same day if for thanksgiving. Thanksgiving. Gratitude is offered and shared.

A vow or freewill offering may be eaten the next day, not the third. Not stale. Worship is not to be delayed too long.
A vow or freewill offering may be eaten the next day, not the third. Not stale. Worship is not to be delayed too long.
A vow or freewill offering may be eaten the next day, not the third. Not stale. Worship is not to be delayed too long.
Unclean flesh is not eaten; the unclean who eats is cut off. Clean only. Holiness guards the table.
Unclean flesh is not eaten; the unclean who eats is cut off. Clean only. Holiness guards the table.
Unclean flesh is not eaten; the unclean who eats is cut off. Clean only. Holiness guards the table.
Eat no fat of ox, sheep, or goat, on pain of being cut off. No fat. The best portion is God's.
Eat no fat of ox, sheep, or goat, on pain of being cut off. No fat. The best portion is God's.
Eat no fat of ox, sheep, or goat, on pain of being cut off. No fat. The best portion is God's.
Eat no fat of ox, sheep, or goat, on pain of being cut off. No fat. The best portion is God's.
Eat no blood of fowl or beast. No blood. Life belongs to God alone.
Eat no blood of fowl or beast. No blood. Life belongs to God alone.
The peace offering's fat is burnt; the breast is waved before the LORD. Waved. The gift is presented to God.
The peace offering's fat is burnt; the breast is waved before the LORD. Waved. The gift is presented to God.

The right shoulder and breast are the priests' portion. The priests' share. God provides for His ministers.
The right shoulder and breast are the priests' portion. The priests' share. God provides for His ministers.

This is the law of the offerings, given to Moses in Sinai. The law. God's order for worship is set.
